args: launcher_rel="apm_modules/srobroek/agentic-packages/packages/mcp-1mcp/scripts/launcher.sh"; for apm_root in "${APM_HOME:-}" "${HOME}/.apm" "$PWD/.apm"; do [ -n "$apm_root" ] || continue; launcher="$apm_root/$launcher_rel"; [ -r "$launcher" ] && exec bash "$launcher"; done; echo 1mcp-apm-launcher-not-found-run-apm-install >&2; exit 1
